intro: Seedance 2.0 is ByteDance Seed's unified multimodal audio-video model for generation, reference-guided creation, and editing. Its strongest workflows assign explicit roles to image, video, and audio inputs, then direct camera movement, performance, continuity, and synchronized sound as one production brief.
capabilities: Multimodal reference direction across image, video, and audio inputs
Joint visual and audio timing for dialogue, Foley, ambience, and music
Long-take camera paths, character performance, and scene continuity
Natural-language editing and controlled transformation of existing footage
